model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Turn on the existing cosine LR scheduler to improve optimization within the fixed training budget with a minimal, low-risk change.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Slightly increase Adam learning rate to speed early optimization under the fixed 256-step budget while keeping the change minimal.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Probe a slightly larger step size since 8e-4 improved strongly; 1e-3 may further improve convergence within 256 steps.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Try AdamW to decouple weight decay from adaptive moments, which can improve generalization at this learning-rate regime.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Return to the best-performing optimizer configuration seen so far after AdamW+1e-3 regressed.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Reduce regularization slightly to improve fit in the short fixed-step regime where overfitting risk is limited.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase early feature width to improve representational capacity while keeping the architecture simple and unchanged in depth.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"With higher model capacity, slightly stronger weight decay may improve validation loss by better controlling overfitting.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase classifier capacity to better exploit stronger convolutional features from the wider backbone.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Revert classifier width increase since it degraded validation loss, returning to the stronger compact head.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"CHANNEL_MULT = 2","new":"CHANNEL_MULT = 3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase second block width growth to raise feature capacity while keeping depth and training loop unchanged.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Use larger batches to improve gradient estimate quality and cover more examples within the fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With the larger batch size, a higher learning rate is often effective; test 1e-3 to accelerate progress within fixed steps.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Restore the better-performing learning rate after the increase to 1e-3 worsened validation loss.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Test an even larger batch to process more unique examples within the fixed-step budget and potentially improve generalization.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Probe whether further increasing batch size improves fixed-step efficiency by exposing more data per optimizer step.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Continue scaling batch size to maximize examples processed per fixed number of optimizer steps.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"At very large batch size, a modestly higher learning rate can better utilize each update and may further reduce validation loss.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}
